sub_modules.conv2d_addr_gen: Combinational column address increment and end-of-line detection for the raster stream.
sub_modules.conv2d_window_valid: Combinational valid generation once enough rows and columns have filled the stencil window.
sub_modules.conv2d_kernel_coeff: Combinational coefficient lookup for the default 3x3 Gaussian kernel, with identity fallback for other odd kernel sizes.
sub_modules.conv2d_dot_product: Combinational matrix-vector dot product over the flattened stencil window and kernel coefficients.
sub_modules.conv2d_round_clip: Combinational output-width truncation stage for the accumulated convolution result.
